concerns.text: The plan acknowledges N=200 yields power ~0.65-0.70 for d=0.3, yet the spec (SC-006) mandates Power ≥ 0.80. The proposed mitigation ('explicitly report this limitation') does not satisfy the requirement to detect the effect. The study design is underpowered to answer the research question as specified.

The plan averages multiscale entropy across scales m=1–5 into a single metric. This aggregation risks construct validity loss; entropy at different temporal scales may have distinct or opposing relationships with risk-taking. Collapsing them obscures the specific temporal dynamics the hypothesis likely targets.

The plan proposes a mass-univariate linear model (DSRT ~ Entropy + Age + Sex + FD). However, FR-009 requires validating that entropy is not trivially correlated with residual noise variance. The plan does not specify how the 'noise-variance covariate' will be derived or included in the model to satisfy this confound control requirement.
